TextView.value: Inventory Manager - delete named items/ql on it hitting the inventory ONLY
Best used in conjunction with lootmanager.
Be PRECISE about what you would like to delete or be prepared to cry.
KNOWN ISSUE - Sometimes adding rules bugs out and you get gibberish. Lootmanager has the same issue. Just delete gibberish line, eject, inject and continue.
KNOWN ISSUE - Sometimes the game says an item in inventory is being equipped when it isn't. Just zone.
Be careful about adding backpack types (eg Beeping Backpack). Even if you have renamed it this plugin will delete it (the SDK still sees the original name).
Developed by Skream. LootManager developed by Devi, Skream, Know and others
